MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-17-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF FINAL JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE COURT WILL ENTER THE PROPOSED FINAL JUDGMENT ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT B TO THE BELTRAMO DECLARATION. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR ENTRY OF FINAL JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: - FINAL JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION - (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) -

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Final Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF FINAL JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for entry of final judgment pursuant to stipulation is granted. The court will enter the proposed final judgment attached as Exhibit B to the Beltramo Declaration. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
